name: Smart Reminders

style_profile.background: soft sky-to-grass photographic gradient with depth-of-field decor
style_profile.accent_role: headline color, occasional pastel reminder cards (pink/peach)
style_profile.typography: bold humanist sans-serif, large headline + smaller subheadline
style_profile.layout: text top, photographic phone mockup floating with 3D props (books, flowers)
style_profile.mockup_treatment: device tilted, content visible, decorative emoji + 3D objects flanking
style_profile.callouts: none, content speaks via visible app UI

headlines_observed: Smart reminders that keep your life on track.
